titleStmt.title: SII 25.203: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 203. (A.R. No. 203 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the verandah of the first prākāra in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
The record may be assigned to c. 13th century on palaeographical grounds.

It refers to an order (ōlai) of Chokkaṉāyaṉ Rājagambīra Śōḻiya-varaiyaṉ and records the grant of 2 mā of lands at Nambaṉkuṟichchi, a hamlet of Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉich-charuppēdimaṅgalam for tirukkaikoṭṭippuṟam as iṟaiyili to the reciters (ōduvar) of Tiruvuśāttāṉamuḍaiya-nāyaṉār temple. The document was attested by Villavadarayan and other signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ Irācakempiraccoḻiyaraiyaṉ Ōlai . Olaikku Etiraṭai . cokkaṉāyaṉāṉ Irācakampiraccoḻiyavaraiyaṉ Ō
lai . Uṭaiyār tiruvuccāttāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkoyil tāṉattār kaṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṉār koyil tirukkaik koṭṭiyil tirumu
ṟaiyār tirukkāppu nikki Otuvāṟkku Iṟaiyiliyāka Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷa kulācaṉic caruppeti maṅkalattu piṭākai nampaṉ
kuṟucciyil Iṅkuttaikkāṇiyāṉa nilattu Īccaṅ kuḷattukkum vaṭakku Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉattukku meṟkum tiṭai
kku vaṭakkum caṇṭeśvarappiccaṉ nilattukku kiḻakkum tevatānattukku teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Orumā muntirikaik
kiḻ mukkāle mākāṇiyum Iṅku viṭṭu Iṟaikuttu varai maṭaivāykkālukkut teṟkum Āṇṭār piccaṉaṉ tevar nilattukku
meṟku kaliyāṇapurattukkup pokiṟa peruvaḻikku vaṭakkum paṟṟilikku kiḻakkum tevatāṉam tiruppaḷḷi Eḻucci nilattukku teṟku
m taṭi Iraṇṭiṉāl nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi kiḻ muṉṟumā mukkāṇiyum Āka rūpāy 2 mā Innilam Iraṇṭumāvum Irupa
ttiraṇṭāvatu taim māta mutal Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭatu Innilattut tarappaṭi maṭakkukkāṇippaṟṟāy muṉpu Iṟuttup po
tukiṟapaṭiye kaṭamai kuṭimai Uḷḷiṭṭiṉa cantirātitta varaiyum kāṇippaṟṟuṭaṉe kūṭṭi Iṟutti kuṭukku
miṭattu Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭatu Innilam Iṉṉāḷ mutal tirukkaikoṭṭip puṟamāka tevatānattuṭane kūṭṭi ka
l veṭṭik koḷḷavum tirukkai koṭṭi Otuvāraṅkiṭṭu niccayittār Otuvār kaḷākap paṇṇu
vate Ippaṭikku Ivai cokka nāyanāna Irācakempiraccoḻiyavarayan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai villavatarayan E
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irācakempiraveḷān Eḻuttu Ivai kulottuṅka veḷān Eḻuttu Ivai nallūruṭaiyā
n Eḻuttu Ivai Aḻakiya coḻaveḷān Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 25.203 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
